message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Update Relationship Event Handler UML

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #EEEEEE
  ActorBorderColor #333333
  ActorBackgroundColor #EEEEEE
  BoxBorderColor #333333
  BoxPadding 10
  ArrowColor #222222
  MessageAlign left
}

box "SNS" #d97a96
participant "Event Dispatcher Topic" as SNS
end box

box "Lambda" #f39c12
participant "Update Relationship Event Handler" as L
end box

box "DynamoDB" #3b6bdc
database "Relationship Owner Table" as ROT
database "Relationship Commitment Table" as RCT
end box

SNS -> L : filter on\nRelationship::Update Event
activate L

L -> L : [SessionDecorator.puml]
L -> L : [TrackEventHandlerWrapper.puml]
L -> L : extract Message from Event
L -> L : validate Message
L -> L : validate event-name
L -> L : validate event-version
L -> L : validate stage

L -> ROT : Get Existing Relationship
ROT --> L

L -> L : Generate Relationship Dict
L -> L : Combine Existing Relationship\nAttributes With New Changes

opt [if missing required schema key]
  L -> L : <color:red>Error Handling</color>
end

L -> L : Get AdditionalAttributes

alt [if Relationship contains description and AdditionalAttributes\ndoesn't contain completed signal]
  L -> ROT : update Relationship
  ROT --> L
  L -> L : <color:red>Error Handling</color>
end

L -> L : Generate commitments to add or delete

alt [if Commitment Operations Exist]
  L -> L : Generate starting indexes based on AdditionalAttributes
  L -> RCT : Batch_Write() RelationshipCommitments
  RCT --> L
  L -> L : <color:red>Error Handling</color>
end

L -> L : Track Event Handler Wrapper
L -> L : Error Handler Wrapper

deactivate L
@enduml
```
